title: Consistent Open in Salesforce Icon and Button for Reports and Dashboards
story: As a Salesforce administrator, I want a clear and consistent icon to indicate which buttons will open Salesforce, so that I can distinguish between DataTools actions and Salesforce navigation at a glance.
description:
Adds a standardized Salesforce vector icon (color #0D9DDA) to the Reports and Dashboards data table and sidebar. The icon serves as a hyperlink that opens the corresponding report or dashboard directly in Salesforce.

The icon includes a tooltip reading "Open in Salesforce" and uses consistent sizing across the entire DataTools Pro application. This establishes the visual pattern for all Salesforce navigation links throughout the product.
acceptance_criteria: Salesforce icon is displayed in the data table as a clickable column
Clicking the icon opens the corresponding Salesforce report/dashboard in a new tab
Tooltip displays 'Open in Salesforce' on hover
Icon size is consistent across the entire DataTools Pro application
Icon appears in the sidebar detail view as well
ux_changes: Added a Salesforce vector icon (#0D9DDA) as a hyperlink column in the Reports/Dashboards data table and sidebar. Includes 'Open in Salesforce' tooltip. Establishes a consistent icon pattern for Salesforce navigation across the app.
implementation_notes: The icon is a simple hyperlink to the Salesforce page URL for the report/dashboard — not an API call. Icon was clarified during implementation to ensure consistent understanding between the team.
comment_summary: Balaji initially misunderstood the icon as triggering a Salesforce API call. Waqar and Ryan clarified it is just a hyperlink to the Salesforce page. Balaji completed and pushed to development.
